title: Loan Application State Diagram
description: Interactive UML state machine for a loan application lifecycle with play-through, click-for-legal-operations, and a toggle for forbidden transitions.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Information Systems
Systems Analysis and Design
UML
State Machines
learningObjectives: Read a state diagram and identify states and transitions
List legal transitions out of any state
Explain why a state diagram fits an object with a lifecycle
Recognize state machines as business-rule guardrails

controls.description: Click for legal operations per state

assumptions: Simplified consumer loan; no payment-plan modifications
limitations: No nested states or concurrent regions
